items: Laser Blaster
A handheld weapon that fires concentrated beams of light.
Data Chip
A tiny wafer that stores vast amounts of information.
Jetpack
A back-mounted thruster that lets the wearer fly.
Plasma Shield
An energy barrier that deflects incoming fire.
Hologram Projector
A device that creates three-dimensional images from light.
Quantum Drive
An engine that bends space for faster-than-light travel.
Force Field
An invisible barrier of energy that blocks physical objects.
Neural Link
An implant that connects the brain directly to machines.
Teleporter
A device that disassembles matter and reassembles it elsewhere.
Anti-gravity Boots
Footwear that lets the wearer walk on walls and ceilings.
Communicator
A small device for instant contact across vast distances.
Scanner
A handheld sensor that reads energy, life signs, and materials.
Power Cell
A compact energy source that fuels advanced technology.
Cloaking Device
A system that bends light to make things invisible.
Time Machine
A device that moves through time as others move through space.
Stasis Pod
A chamber that freezes a body in suspended animation.
Beacon
A signal transmitter that broadcasts location across space.
Translator
A device that converts alien speech into understandable language.
Exosuit
A powered frame worn over the body for enhanced strength.
Memory Core
A crystalline unit that stores an entire mind's worth of data.
